message:
Include module changelogs in parent release pages

Enable parent release pages to display module changelogs in a
compact bullet format (emoji + title + authors) by:

- Enhancing YAML parser to handle nested object properties
  (for parsing `modules` field in manifest.yaml)
- Reading module versions from parent release manifests
- Refactoring sync flow to read all module releases before
  writing parent releases, allowing matched module content
  to be included
- Adding moduleReleases parameter to generateMdxContent
  function to append module changelogs after horizontal rule

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
